nasb.text: ‘Do not defile yourselves by any of these things; for by all these the nations which I am casting out before you have become defiled.

esv.text: “Do not make yourselves unclean by any of these things, for by all these the nations I am driving out before you have become unclean,

cnv.text: “你們不可讓這些事的任何一件玷污自己，因為我將要從你們面前趕出去的各族，就是被這些事玷污了自己。

ccb.text: “你们不可做这些事玷污自己。因为我要在你们面前赶走的各国正是因为这些行为而玷污了自己。
